drill.lineComplete: Line complete — saved to your review schedule!
drill.notInRepertoire: Not in your repertoire — try again, or reveal.

repertoire.title: Repertoire
repertoire.emptyMine: Your repertoire is empty. Pick openings to learn as White and as Black from the curated catalog.
repertoire.emptyOther: No lines yet. Build one on the <playTab>Play</playTab> board, then “★ Save line”.

name.title: Opening
name.noneYet: No named opening yet — play a few moves.
name.fromStartOnly: Opening names are shown from the standard start position.
name.searchHint: Find any opening by name or ECO code, then load it onto the board.

save.title: Save line to repertoire
save.noMoves: Make some moves on the board first, then save the line.
save.mustStartInitial: Repertoire lines must start from the initial position.
